## Diwali: Entering the Season of Light

## A Vote for Murthy is a Vote for Good
A few weeks ago, a member of our Admin team told us about the FedEx Small Business Grant and suggested that we should enter. If the Murthy Law Firm receives this grant, we would extend another annual day of service to our employees. Our Philanthropy...

## Breaking Boundaries: A Second Biography that Includes Sheela Murthy
The New Year brings with it a new biography, and Sheela Murthy is among five IndianAmerican women leaders whose stories are its focus. Breaking Boundaries also features Jagruti Panwala, Gauthami Vemula Qeijo, Dr. Nimisha Shukla, and Dr. Madhulika Guha Thakurta. Each woman was born in...

## “Being Sheela” a Biography Recently Published by Harper Collins
The critically acclaimed biography “Being Sheela: The Life Journey of an Immigration Attorney” has recently been released by Harper Collins.What is “Being Sheela” about? It explores the life of a woman who has made it her purpose to strive for a better world. With insightful detours...

## A Matter of Life and Death

## Murthy Law Firm Gives Back to the Community

## Murthy Major Contributor to AIC, Which Will Honor Influential Immigrants
On April 6, 2017, the American Immigration Council (AIC) will host its 22nd annual Immigrant Achievement Awards in Washington D.C. The AIC is a nonprofit organization that promotes laws, policies, and attitudes honoring our rich history as a nation of immigrants. The awards will honor...
